creator: dev@tripwire.com
text:
3D Labs X-Server is not built for 2.2.8 and 3.0 releases.

Fix: 

Have /usr/ports/x11/XFree86/scripts/configure
build the XF86_3DLabs server might help...

It doesn't seem to build them...
How-To-Repeat: 
ls /usrX11R6/bin directory, notice the XF86_3DLabs server is not installed.

Run /usr/X11R6/bin/XF86Setup

Pick Creative Labs Blaster Exxtreme as the video card and wait for the
error: XF86_3DLabs not found.
